attributes.description_normalized: Acquirer scheme identifier used to qualify the preauthorization-to-completion transaction-type mapping.

normalization_notes.after: Acquirer scheme identifier used to qualify the preauthorization-to-completion transaction-type mapping.
normalization_notes.evidence: Page 419 describes the table as linking preauthorization and completion transaction types; ACQ_SCHM is part of the unique mapping key with both transaction types and institution. Same-named NUMBER(6) columns are consistently documented as acquirer scheme identifiers; default 999999 likely denotes a broad match, but that meaning is not asserted without explicit evidence.
